review_title: Are you benefiting from local SEO works then this tool is for you.
description: After public launch, we started looking for tools for brand management and social media sentiments but were lucky to encounter the Chatmeter as it has more than what we're looking. It definitely saved our time, money and efforts from buying many different tools or SaaS for the very same purpose.
author: Gourav M.
pros: This is nothing less than juggernaut with so many essential features and we can opt for all the things through Chatmeter from reviews to social media engagements and sentiments, checking received reviews on all the platforms from Facebook to Google business. And, it's really a very amazing thing about the Chatmeter and our team love this tool.
cons: Every customer loves transparent and clear pricing on a dedicated pricing page which is missing on the Chatmeter website. If it's made available then it will be best and surely build more trust on the Chatmeter.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Everyone I have worked with on the Chatmeter team has been a true professional, a great listener and incredibly helpful. The software itself is robust and easy to use. We've been with Chatmeter long enough to witness several major new feature rollouts and they've all been seamless. What's more, I am a huge fan of Chatmeter's weekly webinars. They are always full of great information and although I consider myself to be a very skilled professional when it comes to both reputation management and listings management, I always leave each webinar having learned something new, as well as reviewed important topics and details to keep them top of mind.
author: Roger W.
pros: I love the ease of use, customization, insights and data analysis and all-in-one nature of the Chatmeter platform.
cons: I recently requested a missing feature related to review response templates and was told by our customer success representative that it was already in development. Love the fact that Chatmeter takes its platform development seriously and is listening to its customers to continually improve the product.

description: Overall it's good. Our customer success representative is really great and goes above and beyond to help us where she can. She responds very quickly and escalated our issues. We've had too many issues though that go unexplained at times. The platform is very glitchy.
author: Stephanie S.
pros: I really liked it at first and think it's a great starting platform to manage reviews and listings for any company under 100 listings. Once you grow out of that, it seems like you outgrow the platform.
cons: Not able to modify or set any of the sentiments. Sometimes the A.I. registers random words that are completely irrelevant like "girl" or "there." We would have liked to tag and track things like "mask" "COVID testing," etc. But I can only do that using the reports tab. Also, not being able to manage Yelp, Apple, Yahoo, Bing, or Yellowpages within the platform can get backed up. Chatmeter was not able to help us with issues regarding Facebook spam policies. We had to go and research it ourselves. We assumed Chatmeter would have a partnership with Facebook.

description: The customer service is amazing, and the product offerings are continuously getting better and broader.
author: Jessie W.
pros: With over 120 different properties, Chatmeter is SO easy to filter in all reviews, ensure listings are correct, and mass publish to social media. All of our property managers and regional supervisors are set up to receive weekly review emails, and because of this they can easily stay on top of issues. It would be impossible to manage such a large portfolio without Chatmeter.
cons: The only things I wish for is link previews, meta descriptions, and clickable photos when posting links on social media, as well as full access to review responses in the dashboard (ApartmentRatings, Apartments.com, etc.)

description: I enjoy doing business with Chatmeter, our reps are very available and always ready to answer questions, troubleshoot issues or do training with our teams.
author: Jen J.
pros: Chatmeter puts almost everything you need for reviews in one place, you can read reviews, respond, research and report all from one dashboard for all your review sources.
cons: From time to time we will see old reviews pop up again and we never get a straight answer as to how they got back into the system. This can be confusing and time consuming to figure out that they are not new as they may seem but previously responded reviews.

description: Overall, we're happy with our experience with Chatmeter and they've been great about updating and creating new features over the years.
author: Amy E W.
pros: Chatmeter has dramatically changed our ability to keep consistency across our broad footprint.
cons: The review builder is not useful/none feature. I would like the ability to send out review surveys/reminders from Chatmeter.

review_title: Great place for one-stop reputation management
description: We are happy with Chatmeter and plan to continue using it.
author: Colin J.
pros: Overall, we have been happy with Chatmeter. Since we have so many locations and listings, Chatmeter makes it easy to get alerts in a single place. Being able to respond right from the Chatmeter platform is great.
cons: The SEO web tracking feature leaves a lot to be desired. It is often inaccurate or blank and challenging to customize.

description: It has been a pleasure to work with Chatmeter! I could not ask for a better response from their support staff. they have always been extremely helpful with my problems in spite of the often short notice they receive to solve them. ;) I always get a great deal of vital information from their webinars and blog posts that is a huge help in continue to adapt our digital strategy.
author: Chad I.
pros: The listings feature is by far my favorite of the Chatmeter platform. Having 80+ locations across several states made local listings accuracy nearly impossible. Chatmeter's platform made this easy and effective. The frequent changes of address and brands that we have experienced recently would have created absolute chaos with our SEO if not for Chatmeter's listings feature.
cons: Social analytics reporting can be slow to update. Real time updating is an aspect of the Chatmeter platform which I feel can be improved. However there are many features of the platform ( Social publishing and social review response) that are amazing and which I rely on daily.

description: Positive, I have worked with all very prompt and kind, helpful people throughout the experience.
author: Kelly H.
pros: It is all-encompassing and allows me to handle almost all aspects of our online presence in an efficient manner. In addition, I appreciate that the software is often upgrading and not staying stagnant when the industry moves, I notice chatmeter releases new features.
cons: I wish the add-ons and a full package was more transparent. Also, some of the uploading and integration could be improved. As well as Social media Publishing. I enjoy the software used with Buffer, but stuck with chatmeter due to the extended functionality the software provides, even though I preferred the dashboard and functionality Buffer offered.

author: Kelcie S.
pros: Everything you've ever wanted to know about your reviews you're able to find on Chatmeter. It's truly incredible. Plus, it's a super robust platform to use. It allows you to respond to multiple reviews at a time, as well as pull detailed information about each location you have. All around a really cool, insightful program.
cons: This is going to sound silly, but all in all the look of the software is a little dated. While they're on the cutting edge of all things reviews, the platform looks like its from 1999. lol. Just a little thing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Frederick B.
pros: The ability to access important information from anywhere through the toast website.
cons: The loading times can, sometimes, be intrusive.

author: justin C.
pros: I love being able to export almost every piece of information within the tool to create an external report, as well as having the option to build an internal report.
cons: I think the cons for me are not being able to build certain reports to compare year over year, due to being a new Chatmeter users. It would be nice if the behind the scenes algorithms could capture certain information no matter when one has started using Chatmeter.

description: This helps manage the on line reviews in one quick glance.
author: Scott N.
pros: Chatmeter gives you a one stop shop to find all of your reviews and respond to them. This saves a great deal of time instead of having to look around different sites for them.
cons: Sometimes, hard to tell how you compare to others in your ADI.

author: Chad T.
pros: I like the comparison to competitors and the ease of responding to reviews.
cons: Understanding what social posts effect and how often people look up the business effects the overall score more than I feel it should

description: Most part great, fairly easy to navigate and use. Some of the analytics do not change nor fluctuate often. So either useless data for us, or not being used to the full potential for us to capitalize on.
author: Walter B.
pros: I enjoyed the tracking capability of online mentions of the business name regardless of platform it was posted on.
cons: The inability to link all review platforms to Chatmeter for responding to reviews easily.

review_title: All in one social media connector
author: Cheryl L.
pros: ability to connect with all social media outlets on one platform Daily emails that let you know a comment was left somewhere or anywhere, about you.
cons: well, for me...I wish there was step-by-step roadmap to what i should be working on when a specific score is not green...maybe sending an email that says your social score is 59...try these solutions to help you raise that score. Social category is the one area I have the most issue with trying to get that score to rise & I tried to do a few different things but it didn't impact the score.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jason C.
pros: All reviews our guests place in real-time right into one site
cons: None no issues I have while using the service

author: Daniel S.
pros: Your product is extremely easy to navigate.
cons: Honestly, there is nothing I would change about this product.

description: I use it when I need to write a response to a review. Great software, somewhat new to it as I am not on here daily, been happy with it thus far.
author: Lisa R.
pros: How easy it is to respond to reviews and the fact that it has preloaded templates, super easy for fast paced offices and responses.
cons: The dashboard has a lot going on, not sure I will ever need or use it all.

description: Excellent! I check the site almost daily and enjoy reading the wonderful positive reviews. If there are negative reviews it provides us the ability to respond quickly and address the concern.
author: Wanda S.
pros: The ease of seeing all your portfolio reviews in one place and being able to respond to most of those on the dashboard.
cons: Not being able to respond to all reviews from this site. There are only a few that you cannot though.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Codrina D.
pros: Love the pre-set responses, notifications, and reporting.
cons: Some reports are hard to pull up by dates.

author: Megan A.
pros: Ease of use with excellent customer service.
cons: There isn’t anything I really dislike about the software

description: With all the other tasks to do with owning a pizza shop, it makes it real easy to keep on top of the reviews for my shop.
author: Larry I.
pros: Chatmeter is very easy to use. It also aggregates the reviews you receive through social media so nothing slips through the cracks. It's easy for me to get an email in the morning from Chatmeter and reply to a review that same day.
cons: There really hasn't been a downside. They even have some tutorials on how to write a response to a review, both positive and negative.

author: Corinne M.
pros: I found that is was very easy to navigate. I personally didn't use all features for my role. But responding to a variety of customer reviews all in one place made it really eay and convenient! The integration with other apps was nice!
cons: I didn't find many difficulties using this but a lot of features were not necessary for me so I did not spend the time clicking around outside of the customer review pages

author: Becky P.
pros: The flow of the software is easy and logical.
cons: I don't really understand the LBV summary.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
